description: Style Note boss perfumes from the house of hugo boss makes you feel confident and fresh even at the end of a particularly trying day. Creating an impressive impression any time of the day, these intense fragrances are meant to be worn. Product Details boss in Motion Black is a spray perfume for men and comes in a circular shaped glass flask with a shiny black opaque cover Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying in eyes Size 90 ml
